sub_themes.name: SIEM & Log Monitoring
sub_themes.description: Continuous observation of security information and event management systems.

sub_themes.name: Real-time Alert Triage
sub_themes.description: Initial assessment and prioritization of security alerts as they occur.

sub_themes.name: Anomaly & Event Detection
sub_themes.description: Identification of deviations from normal baseline activities.

sub_themes.name: Containment & Isolation
sub_themes.description: Actions taken to limit the scope and magnitude of a security incident.

sub_themes.name: Incident Remediation
sub_themes.description: Technical steps to remove threats and restore systems to a known good state.

sub_themes.name: Escalation Management
sub_themes.description: The process of moving complex incidents to higher-level specialized teams.

sub_themes.name: Root Cause Analysis
sub_themes.description: Determining the underlying reason for a security event or incident.

sub_themes.name: Digital Forensics
sub_themes.description: Collection and analysis of digital evidence from systems and networks.

sub_themes.name: Malware Analysis
sub_themes.description: Examination of malicious software to understand its behavior and impact.

sub_themes.name: Vulnerability Scanning
sub_themes.description: Automated identification of known security weaknesses in the environment.

sub_themes.name: Patch & Update Management
sub_themes.description: Ensuring systems are up-to-date with the latest security fixes.

sub_themes.name: IOC Consumption & Matching
sub_themes.description: Integrating external indicators of compromise into internal monitoring.

sub_themes.name: OSINT & Threat Research
sub_themes.description: Gathering intelligence on emerging threats and threat actor behaviors.

sub_themes.name: Network Security Ops
sub_themes.description: Managing and monitoring network-based security controls.

sub_themes.name: Endpoint Security Ops
sub_themes.description: Managing and monitoring security agents on individual workstations and servers.

sub_themes.name: Standard Operating Procedures
sub_themes.description: Developing and adhering to documented security operations processes.

sub_themes.name: Compliance Reporting & Audit
sub_themes.description: Demonstrating adherence to internal and external security standards.

sub_themes.name: Ticketing & Case Management
sub_themes.description: The administrative tracking of security events and investigations.

sub_themes.name: Stakeholder Notification
sub_themes.description: Keeping relevant parties informed during security events.

sub_themes.name: Security Tool Maintenance
sub_themes.description: Ensuring security tools are functional and performant.

sub_themes.name: Automation & Scripting
sub_themes.description: Developing code to streamline repetitive SOC tasks.

sub_themes.name: Continuous Learning
sub_themes.description: Ongoing skill development for security analysts.

sub_themes.name: Team Collaboration
sub_themes.description: Internal coordination and support within the security team.
